'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=_I96_iMQ7VzZszXQGHqfU3nMve78FTmh2whyotm4zY4-1771024932-1.0.1.1-qklhQlSLzrn91eJ2QO0hn1IaZ_gf8hul_SvMa_ReH08"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
